name: @pi-kit/pi-webterm-server
description: Pi WebTerm server daemon — tmux-backed terminal proxy for remote Pi access via WebSocket

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const { chmodSync } = require('fs'); const p = require('path'); try { const dir = p.dirname(require.resolve('node-pty/prebuilds/darwin-arm64/spawn-helper')); chmodSync(p.join(dir, 'spawn-helper'), 0o755); } catch(e) {}"
